step_rationale: Paraoxonase protecting against oxidative stress; lipid metabolism regulation.
mechanism: Antioxidant enzyme reducing oxidative modification of lipoproteins and limiting atherosclerotic lesion progression.

references.title: Plasma Protein Profile Associated With a Family History of Early-Onset Coronary Heart Disease.
Dietary antioxidants and paraoxonases against LDL oxidation and atherosclerosis development.
